title: Kids Camping Outdoor Survival Multitool with Whistle Compass, 7 in 1 Flashlight
description:
This is a simple and fun to use 7 in 1 waterproof survival multi-purpose whistle. It includes a thermometer, 5X magnifier, signal mirror, LED flashlight, whistle, compass, and a storage compartment. Get the kids off the couch and get them outside! Time to teach your children the basic camping and survival skills that have been handed down to you by your parents, their parents, and of course the Boy Scouts. This multi-use whistle is the start to good preparation and essential outdoor safety.

Kids Camping Outdoor Survival Multitool with Whistle Compass, 7 in 1 Flashlight

This is a simple and fun to use 7 in 1 waterproof survival multi-purpose whistle. It includes a thermometer, 5X magnifier, signal mirror, LED flashlight, whistle, compass, and a storage compartment.

Key Features

  • 5x Magnifier
  • Signal Mirror
  • LED Flashlight
  • Whistle

Product Specifications

  • Color: Green
